name: Challenge the Basketball
description: Welcome to Challenge the Basketball, an exciting and addictive basketball challenge game designed for players who love sports, quick reflexes, and skill-based gameplay. Get ready to test your shooting accuracy, timing, and focus in this fun and engaging basketball experience. In Challenge the Basketball, your goal is simple but challenging: aim carefully, throw the basketball at the right time, and score as many points as possible. As you progress, the difficulty increases with faster movement, tricky angles, and new obstacles that push your basketball skills to the limit.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
